titleStmt.title: SII 40.41: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 41. (A.R. No. B. 20 of 1930.) Cherlaguḍipāḍu, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab set up in a field about three miles to the south-east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1477, Ānanda, Āshāḍha śu. 11.

Records the gift of land in the village Medegala to a Brāhmaṇa of Āpastaṁba-sūtra and Yajus-śākhā named Mārambhaṭṭa by a certain Mallānāyani, son of a person (name lost) and grandson of Kurumaddi Mallarāyanigāru of Vipparla-gōtra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudayulu śāli
vāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1477 Agunē
ṭi Ānaṁdanāma saṁvatsara [Ā]ṣāḍa su
dda 11 kādaśilu vippa¨rllagōtrōbha(dbha)vulai
na garapāṭi bhairava gaṁḍabhēraṁḍa paliya
gaṁḍabhēruṁḍa birudāṁkitulaina kurumaddima
lārāyani komālaina sapāvainaḍu nija putṛlaina
mallānāyanivāru Āpastaṁbasūtra yajuśśākhādhya
yulaina māraṁbhaṭla dēśa pautṛlunu
gāri putrulaina māraṁbhaṭlaku yiccina bhū
dāna dharmaśāsanakramameṭlannanu medegala grāmāna tū
¨rpūna pūrvana bōyavirāredibarudāninavuḍu Ēgu
ddi yatadhātidi Ēkādaśi
puṇyakālamaṁddu gaṁgaga¨rbhamapanaharaṇa darada
rāvākapuragānekeḍu kṣētra dharvāśeya sivāru
sakhyā gaṁya . kṣētrahāra Araśrīyamunu vilōmadikema
ye cāya cenudunuvu Arānaku malikuḍi Ā
ya varicenu yena tū¨rpu matu vu daṁḍu reku
ṭluseru kraṇaru bāha yarabhaṭla
ce yavakragānu dāravōsi yistimi
mī putrapautrapāraparyatamugā
Anubhaviṁca
Digital edition of SII 40.41 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
